nasb.text: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your daughter-in-law; she is your son’s wife, you shall not uncover her nakedness.

esv.text: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your daughter-in-law; she is your son’s wife, you shall not uncover her nakedness.

cnv.text: 你不可揭露你兒媳的下體；她是你兒子的妻子，你不可揭露她的下體。

ccb.text: 不可与儿媳乱伦。她是你儿子的妻子，不可与她乱伦。
